title: fix(desktop): honor runtime otto home for field notes

codeRecommendation.reason: The implementation now keeps field-note artifacts and the associated run, receipt, and practice-metrics records inside runtime OTTO_HOME, with regression coverage and local gate proof.

shipRecommendation.reason: This is a narrow local-data isolation fix that should ship with the functional-labs train once Sebastian accepts the PR. It does not justify a standalone release cut by itself.

bugsFixedByCodexReview: Default PracticeRunner run, receipt, and practice-metrics stores still used import-time OTTO_DIR defaults even after field-note artifacts moved to runtime OTTO_HOME.
The practice-runner test helper restored an absent OTTO_HOME by assigning undefined instead of deleting the environment variable.
Regression coverage now proves a default PracticeRunner writes artifact, run, receipt, and metrics receipt paths under runtime OTTO_HOME.

proof.screenshotReason: Backend/local filesystem behavior; data proof is the relevant evaluation artifact.

verification.details: root typecheck pass; desktop/electron typecheck pass; bun test 262 pass, 1 skip, 0 fail, 906 expect calls; verify:v0 5 passed, 0 failed; devex mint validate pass; devex broken-links pass; electron-vite build pass; bun audit no vulnerabilities
Installed and launched /Applications/otto-staging.app with isolated staging root; no live Letta connection claimed.
